race.comment: HOOT 'N' HOLLER (4) resumed over 1100m at Gatton and was only beaten 1.75 lengths. She was expected to need the outing and has plenty up her sleeve. Loves this track and has a handy 2kg claim. GOLDEN LOOM (2) has switched from a Sydney yard on a 41-day return. Has been racing well enough over a mile in better company and tackles 1200m for the first time. The 1.5kg claim helps and the betting will be key. TORONESS (10) has been racing in stronger grade and always puts in. Has a key gear switch on a 7-day return and deserves consideration.  Stablemate BROOKLYN DAISY (6) resumed and has switched from the Currie yard. May need one but has placed 2/3 this course and distance and keep her onside. SWITCHBLADE (7) has the ability and has trialled well for his return. The wide gate is against but the 2kg claim helps back a level.
